title: task
description: identity.rs:109 - Test identity_from_seed_consistent uses seed twice but Seed doesn't implement Copy (due to ZeroizeOnDrop). Need to clone seed for second call: Identity::from_seed(seed.clone()). Failure scenario: cargo test --all-features fails to compile.
close_reason: Already fixed: seed.clone() is already present on line 108, allowing the seed to be used twice since Seed has ZeroizeOnDrop and cannot implement Copy. lichen-link crate compiles successfully.
